notes: (Each opponent card summoned in this way.)

abilities.text: Gain +1 ATK and DEF for each other [Furry] on any board.

abilities.text: (At any time) Special Summon this card and target 3 characters on an opponent's board to use to make a valid Special Meld (for that player). They do not draw from the Faith Deck.

abilities.title: Tuorps
abilities.text: At the start of each opponent's turn (after drawing): They choose 1 card to discard from their hand.

rulings: Uses current on-board stats. You can use cards with 0 ATK.

abilities.title: Polymerization
abilities.text: (CbNS) You can Special Summon this card by overlaying it on "Blue-Eyes White Dragon".

abilities.title: De-Fusion
abilities.text: Discard this card; Special Summon up to 3 "Blue-Eyes White Dragon" from your hand, the deck, or discard pile.

abilities.title: Shamiko Punch

(CbNS) You can Special Summon this card by overlaying it on any character on any board.
You cannot play cards from hand. If you have 10 or more cards in hand: Discard this card.

abilities.title: Upload
abilities.text: Place this and a non-FAITH card from your hand in the Extra Zone. While that card is Extra Zoned: All players can use one of its ACTIVE abilities, once per turn, on their turn.

abilities.title: Mono Blue
abilities.text: (At any time) When a SPELL is activated: You can discard this card; Negate that SPELL and discard that card.

abilities.title: Emote Spam
abilities.text: Target an opponent; Add this card to their hand, then you draw 1 card.

abilities.title: Soulless
abilities.text: (Once per game) Each player who has not activated this card's SPELL effect skips their next turn.
